Watch Video
Internship
Experience
Jeet Shah
Brand Marketing Intern, IndiGo
Class of 2027
“I landed my dream internship at IndiGo in my
first year, where I contributed to launching their business class and
loyalty program. This experience provided me with valuable insights into
airline marketing and customer engagement. I have been passionate about
aviation since childhood and my passion further deepened after meeting Dr.
Anand Srinivasan, Co-founder of Akasa Air, during his tour at Masters’
Union, gaining firsthand industry insights”
Sabarna Jana
Marketing Intern, Epigamia
“During my internship at Epigamia, I was praised
for my market research and identifying the right product-market fit – skills
I honed in the marketing class taught by Mr. Bhupesh Manohar. I also
analyzed raw data with precision with advanced excel, making the experience
both practical and enriching.”
Gyan Banjan
Business Development Intern, Zerope
“My time at ZeroPe offered a front-row view of
India's fintech transformation. I explored consumer behavior in healthcare
spending and successfully converted a previously unreachable client. Tasked
by Ashneer Grover to onboard 20 healthcare partners in two months, I applied
the Need Gap strategy from one of our classes, which helped me close 44
leads in six weeks, earning the position of top performer and an extended
offer to join the team full-time.”
Dhruv Lakra
Product Intern, BluSmart
“During my internship at BluSmart, I developed
expertise in B2B sales, marketing, and social media. My experience in

leads in six weeks, earning the position of top performer and an extended
offer to join the team full-time.”
Dhruv Lakra
Product Intern, BluSmart
“During my internship at BluSmart, I developed
expertise in B2B sales, marketing, and social media. My experience in
Dropshipping Mela helped me understand the business requirements quickly
and I also honed skills in collaboration, analytics, and business building”
Roghan
Founder’s Office Intern, Basil
“I Interned at Basil’s Founder’s Office, where I
crafted marketing strategies, closed deals with HP and Dyninno, and
developed Basil Wallet as a product for these companies. With GTM strategies
taught to us, I drove impactful marketing. The communication training from
Harvard Professor Mihir Mankad equipped me to lead my team for two months”

Shortlisting &
Scholarship
Aptitude Test
About the Online Scholarship Test
After getting confirmation on the shortlist, students will
receive an online
scholarship test from home. The test will be two hours long and
will consist
of questions on data analysis, numerical ability and logical
reasoning. A practice
test will also be provided. Students will get 14 days to finish
the scholarship
test. Based on the aptitude scores, students will be further
shortlisted and
contacted by the admissions team with information about their
in-person simulation
and interview. Preparation materials for the test can be found
Students also have the option to provide their JEE/IPMAT/SAT/CUET
scores. The scholarship test becomes optional for those who have
provided their scores.

Watch a student-led breakdown of a test strategy that can help
you secure Masters’ Union Scholarship
Schedule In-Person
Business Simulation
& Interview
About In-person Business Simulation & Interview
The in-person business simulation will require candidates to
role-play
as a CXO of a company and solve its business challenges in a
team of
5-6 applicants. The interview will be a 1-1 conversation with
our faculty or senior leadership.
The in-person business simulation and interview will be conducted
on the
same day for a student. These will be scheduled across major
cities in India, and over Zoom in exceptional cases.
Admission
Decision
Status of Evaluation
Once shortlisted applicants have submitted their
application along with their aptitude scores, the admissions team will
respond with their final decision and the students will fall into three
categories:
Accepted
Applicants who have been offered admission to Masters’ Union will
receive their decision along with the financial structure for
the upcoming programme.
They will have 7-21 days to confirm their admission through
payment of the admission fee.
Rejected
Applicants rejected by the admissions team can apply to the
programme again in the next academic year.
Waitlisted
Masters’ Union doesn’t maintain any ranked waitlist. Applicants
placed in this
category will have their admission dependent on the spots that
might open up in the cohort.
The admission committee reconvenes to decide the results and
promotion of candidates
from the waitlisted to the accepted pool, regularly.

Frequently Asked
Questions
Can students submit their documents/ certificates later if they need
time to get it from school?
Students can fill the form with certificates that are
available. Later on, they can simply provide the remaining documents to the team as the
application processes.
Is it mandatory for students to submit their class XI marksheet?
Yes, it is. However, if they don’t have the Class XI
marksheet, they can upload an
application explaining the reason for its unavailability at the time of filling out the
application and attach
the PDF in place of the marksheet.
If a student has lost their X result (or any document) which is
mandatory to upload, how can students fill the form?
They can upload an application stating the reason for not
having it under the 10th
marksheet upload section. Ensure to send an official email at
admission@mastersunion.org
later, once the
students obtain it.
Can students edit the video essay?
Yes, they can but it is not needed. We are
judging students on their communication and confidence and not their video editing skills.
Is there a sample video essay?
Yes, here is a
sample video
When will students get their application results and get shortlisted
for the further round?

When will students get their application results and get shortlisted
for the further round?
Results can be expected to be announced
anywhere between 15-30 days after the commencement of the deadline. Post receiving
information on the shortlist, students will receive an online Scholarship (Aptitude) Test
that they have to take online from home.
What if a student has submitted the video but didn't get the
Scholarship (Aptitude) Test mail yet?
The email will be sent once the video is
evaluated and students are selected. Results can be expected to be announced anywhere
between 15-30 days after the submission of the video. Find more details here.
here
What are the passing marks?
We look into the profile holistically before selecting or rejecting a student. However, a score of 35 marks (out of a total of 45) is considered good.
Can students submit their SAT Score instead of taking the Masters’
Union Scholarship (Aptitude) Test?
Yes, students also have the option to
provide their JEE/IPMAT/SAT/CUET scores. The Scholarship (Aptitude) Test becomes optional
for those who have provided their scores and they will be shortlisted on the basis of the
score. Please note that the scholarship test is not just for students looking for
scholarships but is also an essential step of our admission process which enables us to
assess the analytical capabilities of the student.
How much time do students get to prepare for the Scholarship
(Aptitude) Test?
Students will get a 7-day period to finish the Scholarship (Aptitude) Test. Find more
details
Can students use calculators?
Yes, students are allowed to use
calculators. We suggest they keep a pen and paper handy with them during the test and a
glass of water.
Is there any negative marking?
There is no negative marking.

Yes, students are allowed to use
calculators. We suggest they keep a pen and paper handy with them during the test and a

Is there any negative marking?
There is no negative marking.
What is considered a good JEE/IPMAT/CUET percentile?
Percentile greater than or equal to 90 is
considered good.
What is a good SAT score?
Students who choose to submit their SAT
scores, a score greater than or equal to 1500 is considered good. Please note the test score
is one aspect of the application. Student profiles are evaluated holistically.
Can students get an extension to appear for the Scholarship
They can write an email to the
, attaching the specific documents
explaining why an extension is needed. Extension can be granted in genuine cases, as per
consideration via email.
When will the results for the Scholarship (Aptitude) Test be
announced?
anywhere between 15-30 days after the test deadline.
Is the business simulation/ personal interview conducted online or
offline?
The in-person business simulation and
interview will be conducted on the same day for a student. These will be scheduled across
major cities (Delhi, Bengaluru, Mumbai, Ahmedabad, Indore, Hyderabad, Chandigarh) in India
and over Zoom in exceptional cases.
What is GD or business simulation ? How to prepare for it?
The in-person business simulation will
require students to role-play as a CXO of a company and solve its business challenges in a
team of 5-6 applicants. We will send them a case study to prepare for the business
simulation round 3-4 days prior for preparation. In this round, they will be judged on their
creativity, communication, and teamwork skills. They will be participating in a group
discussion for 45 minutes followed by a presentation (without any slides).
What happens in the personal interview, what kind of questions will be
asked?
The interview will be a one-on-one

creativity, communication, and teamwork skills. They will be participating in a group
discussion for 45 minutes followed by a presentation (without any slides).
What happens in the personal interview, what kind of questions will be
asked?
The interview will be a one-on-one
conversation with our faculty or senior leadership. The questions will be around their
application and motivations for applying to Masters' Union. The goal is to know more about
students and what they want to achieve at Masters' Union.
Is there any detailed information about GD/PI ?
The overall process will take around 3 hours.
The business simulation will last 45 minutes followed by a 15 minute group
presentation. Students will be working in teams of 4-6 students on a
simulated
business scenario, where students will be expected to make decisions,
analyse
data and present their findings.
The interview will be conducted by a senior leader or a faculty member at
Masters’ Union and will be approximately 30 minutes long. They will be asked
questions about their application including their achievements, essays and
video essay submitted.
Dress code for the event is smart casuals.
When will the results be declared?
The results are announced 30-45 days after
the date of the interview. You can find more details
Is there a firm deadline for payment of the admission fee?
We provide students ample time till July
of the academic year so that they can make their decision based on all the admission offers
that they have. In case they still want an extension, the same can be granted based on an
email request.
What is the mode of payment for the fees?
Mode of payment can be online, net
banking, bank transfer or in some rare cases they can even send a cheque. Except for cash,
we accept all payment methods.
What is the fee payment schedule?
Students can pay the fees semester wise.

What is the fee payment schedule?

Starting every semester, they will be notified about the fees due by
Does Masters’ Union offer scholarships?
At Masters’ Union we believe that financial constraints should not pose any hindrance to students’ academic aspirations. We have merit and need-based scholarships for all deserving candidates. Students scoring above 35 out of 45 marks in the Masters’ Union Scholarship Aptitude test get a scholarship which can range from 10% - 25% of the tuition fee depending on the student’s performance in the Scholarship (Aptitude)Test and the overall profile of the applicant. For candidates keen on scholarship, we encourage students to submit their application early to allow for our admission counsellors to thoroughly review their scholarship case before presenting it to the admissions committee at the time of evaluation.
Is the scholarship for all four years or just for the first year?
Scholarship is awarded for all four years. If a student
receives a 20% scholarship, they will receive a 20% scholarship every semester on their
respective fees. However, in cases of misconduct or rule violations, disciplinary action may
be taken.
Are there any financing options?
Yes, there are financial institutions that can provide loans
for up to 95% of the programme fees to the admitted students. Read
for further details.
Is the admissions process different for the 3+1 Dual Degree UG
Programme with Illinois Institute of Technology?
No, the admissions process for the 3+1 Dual Degree UG
Programme is the same as the standard process. Applicants must apply through the regular
admissions portal, and eligibility for the programme is assessed based on their academic
performance, extracurricular activities, and an interview.
Will students have the option to choose the duration of transfer?
Currently, the programme is designed as a one-year transfer

admissions portal, and eligibility for the programme is assessed based on their academic
performance, extracurricular activities, and an interview.
Will students have the option to choose the duration of transfer?
Currently, the programme is designed as a one-year transfer
option. Students will spend their fourth year at Illinois Institute of Technology,
completing the final year of their undergraduate degree as part of the 3+1 Dual Degree UG
Programme.
When can the student decide if they want to opt for the 3+1 Dual
Degree UG Programme with Illinois Institute of Technology?
Students are strongly encouraged to decide on opting for the
3+1 Dual Degree UG Programme before starting their undergraduate journey at Masters’ Union.
Early confirmation ensures guaranteed seat allocation and allows for streamlined academic
planning tailored to the programme's requirements.
While students may still choose to opt for the programme during their third year,
this is subject to seat availability, which will be communicated at that time. Confirming at
the beginning ensures a smooth transition and optimal preparation for their transfer to
Illinois Tech.
Will the curriculum at Illinois Tech align with what students study at
Masters’ Union?
Yes, the curriculum has been designed to ensure a seamless
transfer between the institutions. Students will continue to build on the foundational and
advanced topics they study at Masters’ Union.
Can students secure internships in the US while at Illinois Tech?
Yes, students will have access to Illinois Tech’s career
services, which include internship placements, job fairs, and networking events with global
employers.
What will I graduate with at the end of the programme?

Can students secure internships in the US while at Illinois Tech?
Yes, students will have access to Illinois Tech’s career
services, which include internship placements, job fairs, and networking events with global
employers.
What will I graduate with at the end of the programme?
Upon completing the programme, you will be awarded a Professional Certificate for Undergraduate Programme in Tech & Business Management by Masters' Union. Additionally, you will have the option to enrol in IIM Bangalore to pursue a BBA in Digital Business and Entrepreneurship, provided you clear all the exams and the eligibility criteria as set by the IIM Bangalore.
What is the difference between the Masters' Union certification and the IIM Bangalore degree?
The Masters' Union certification focuses on an industry-integrated, tech-driven curriculum designed for business management professionals. The IIM Bangalore (BBA) degree is a traditional academic qualification offered with standard coursework and university examinations.
What makes the Masters’ Union Programme a better choice than earning the same degree from IIM Bangalore?
While the IIM Bangalore degree provides a strong academic foundation,Masters' Union offers real-world exposure from day one. Through
outclasses
internships
starting in Year 1, students gain hands-on experience with industry leaders from top companies like Microsoft, Google, and Zomato. This early exposure, combined with rigorous academic training, ensures that our students are not only academically strong but also industry-ready, with the highest CTC touching ₹61.5 LPA and an average CTC of ₹28.5 LPA, securing top-tier job offers even before graduation.
Is this an online degree, is it authentic?
Yes, the degree is awarded through IIM Bangalore’s online platform, making it an online degree. However, it holds the same recognition and value as any full-time IIM Bangalore degree.
How well is this degree recognised for higher studies abroad?

Is this an online degree, is it authentic?
Yes, the degree is awarded through IIM Bangalore’s online platform, making it an online degree. However, it holds the same recognition and value as any full-time IIM Bangalore degree.
How well is this degree recognised for higher studies abroad?
The degree awarded by IIM Bangalore is highly respected and recognised for higher studies abroad. With IIM Bangalore’s global reputation and the rigor of its curriculum, the degree holds significant international credibility, opening doors to top global universities and MBA programs for further education.
Can I still pursue the Masters' Union certification if I don’t enrol in the IIM Bangalore degree?
Yes, you can still complete the Masters' Union Undergraduate Programme in Tech and Business Management and earn the certification even if you choose not to enrol in the IIM Bangalore degree.

The Dropshipping Challenge is a cornerstone of the UG Programme in Technology & Business
Management, offering students a space to experiment with real-world business building. This year, over
40+ student teams launched digital storefronts, explored influencer marketing, handled logistics, and
navigated the full cycle of launching a product online.
Together, they generated over ₹1.2 Crores in revenue, fulfilling thousands of orders while experimenting
with branding, sourcing, and digital campaigns. The challenge surfaced a wide range of outcomes like
Team Lush’s ₹33L revenue on a lean budget, Khuraak’s notable 43% gross profit margins, and Selldora’s
ROAS being 14X.
This report brings together financial snapshots, reflections from founders, and milestone moments that
emerged during this hands-on learning experience.

Guardex is an AI-first platform that transforms underutilized CCTV networks into real-time, intelligent
infrastructure for operations, security, compliance, and efficiency.
It integrates seamlessly with existing camera systems — no new hardware needed — and works
across factories, warehouses, logistics hubs, and retail chains.
The system uses advanced computer vision and edge AI to detect a wide range of events: from
theft and safety violations to idle time, shift discipline, equipment misuse, and more.
Generates automated, visual reports and actionable insights to support daily audits, remote
oversight, and enterprise-wide accountability.
Guardex transforms passive CCTV into an intelligent control layer — delivering real-time
clarity, not just footage. It’s surveillance that doesn’t just watch, but thinks, detects, and drives
decisions.
